issues.description: $changed_test_files contains newline-separated paths but is interpolated directly into jest_command without converting to spaces. The log line (1334) already uses `tr '\n' ' '` — the command should too: `jest_command="npx jest --passWithNoTests $(echo "$changed_test_files" | tr '\n' ' ')"`. Without this, the agent prompt contains a multi-line command that could be misinterpreted.
